About.title: About me
About.summary: Eight years building websites and web apps. Fintech background. I help people and teams ship online: portfolio sites, landing pages, full services.

highlight.title: Leasing payment calculator
highlight.description: Built a leasing payment calculator at Evolution. In three months: web app, mobile version, integrations with corporate services. Product and sales launched faster.

Services.title: Your site, from idea to launch
Services.lead: Want your own site but stuck on the first step? We pick a domain, plan the structure, build it, and publish.

HomeLab.title: Home Lab
HomeLab.description: Home infrastructure: servers, automation, smart home. A space for personal experiments and making everyday life more convenient.

zapishis_online_bot.title: Zapishis.online

next_downloader_bot.title: Next Downloader Bot
next_downloader_bot.description: Telegram bot for downloading videos from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and more. One message.

eslint_config.title: ESLint Config Awesome
